body.raw:
{
  // لو مباشر خليه true والمورد null، لو تبع مورد خليه false والمورد إجباري
  "is_direct": false,
  "supplier_id": 1, // معرف المورد (لو false بس)

  "hotel_id": 1,
  "room_id": 1,       // لازم تكون الغرفة مربوطة بالفندق ده
  "hotel_view_id": 1, // لازم تكون الإطلالة مربوطة بالفندق ده (اختياري)
  "currency_id": 1,

  "valid_from": "2026-07-01",
  "valid_to": "2026-07-10",

  // نوع نظام الوجبات: يا إما inclusive (مشمولة) أو exclusive (بأسعار منفصلة)
  "meal_plan_type": "inclusive",

  // الحالة 1: لو الوجبات مشمولة (inclusive) بنبعت لستة بمعرفات الوجبات المشمولة من قاعدة البيانات
  "meal_plan_inclusive_details": [2, 3],
  // [1 (Room Only), 2 (Breakfast), 3 (Lunch), 4 (Dinner), 5 (Half Board), 6 (Full Board), 7 (All Inclusive), 8 (Ultra All Inclusive)]

  // الحالة 2: لو الوجبات بأسعار منفصلة (exclusive) بنلغي الحقل اللي فوق (meal_plan_inclusive_details) ونبعت أسعارها كدا:
  // "meal_plan_exclusive_prices": { "2": 15, "4": 30 }, // المفتاح هو معرف الوجبة والقيمة هي سعرها

  "cost_per_night": 100.00, // سعر التكلفة
  "selling_price": 125.00,  // سعر البيع
  "profit_margin": 25.00,   // هامش الربح 

  "tax_type": "inclusive_tax", // نوع الضريبة: يا إما inclusive_tax أو exclusive_tax
  "tax_rate": 15.00, // نسبة الضريبة المئوية

  "status": "approved", //draft,pending,approved,rejected,expired
  "notes_ar": "شامل الإفطار والغداء ورسوم الخدمة.",
  "notes_en": "Includes breakfast, lunch and service fees.",
  "cancellation_policy_ar": "غير مستردة.",
  "cancellation_policy_en": "Non-refundable."
}

request.description: Store a new price. For direct hotels, set is_direct to true and supplier_id to null. For meal plan, use either inclusive (array of meals) or exclusive (key-value pricing object).
Get detailed information of a single price record.

body.raw:
{
  "booking_type": "direct",
  "booking_source": "hotel",
  "customer_id": 1,
  "currency_id": 1,
  "booking_date": "2026-06-28",
  "country_id": 1,
  "city_id": 1,
  "hotel_id": 1,
  "check_in": "2026-07-10",
  "check_out": "2026-07-15",
  "payment_method": "partial",
  "paid_amount": 500.00,
  "second_payment_due_date": "2026-07-05",
  "special_requests": "Haram view room requested.",
  "notes": "Deposit paid by customer.",
  "status": "confirmed",
  "items": [
    {
      "price_id": 1,
      "room_count": 2
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
### Create Booking Endpoint

This endpoint handles bookings of two types:

1. **`booking_type` = `direct` (حجز مباشر)**:
   Requires `booking_source` which can be `hotel` (مباشر من الفندق) or `supplier` (عن طريق مورد).
   Also requires: customer_id, currency_id, hotel_id, check_in, check_out, and items array.

2. **`booking_type` = `quotation` (من عرض سعر)**:
   Requires `quotation_id`. Automatically copies customer, currency, hotel, rooms, check-in, and check-out dates from the accepted quotation.

#### Request Body Schema & Examples:

##### A. Direct Booking:
```json
{
  "booking_type": "direct",
  "booking_source": "hotel", // or "supplier"
  "customer_id": 1,
  "currency_id": 1,
  "booking_date": "2026-06-28",
  "hotel_id": 1,
  "check_in": "2026-07-10",
  "check_out": "2026-07-15",
  "payment_method": "partial", // full, partial, deferred
  "paid_amount": 500.00,
  "second_payment_due_date": "2026-07-05", // required if payment_method is partial
  "special_requests": "Quiet room",
  "notes": "Premium customer",
  "status": "confirmed", // draft, pending_supplier_confirmation, confirmed, checked_in, checked_out, cancelled, no_show
  "items": [
    {
      "price_id": 1,
      "room_count": 2
    }
  ]
}
```

##### B. Quotation Booking:
```json
{
  "booking_type": "quotation",
  "booking_date": "2026-06-28",
  "quotation_id": 1,
  "payment_method": "full",
  "paid_amount": 1200.00,
  "status": "confirmed"
}
```

### Update Booking Endpoint

Allows updating booking type, source, dates, paid amount, special requests, notes, status, and items.

If check-in/check-out dates are changed, nights and pricing subtotals are recalculated automatically for direct booking types.
